title: Moiré Lab
description: Three line/ring gratings whose overlap beats into crawling moiré interference. Each grating rotates and drifts at a fractionally different rate and they combine with a multiply / difference / screen op. A compact, compositable local cousin of the Moiré Pattern Generator, so Patch and the Mixer can capture and pipe it. Frequency, radial↔linear blend, spin, op, and hue are live, mappable, and randomized each load.
